title: erigeron sionis
intro: Erigeron sionis, also known as Sion's fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Erigeron sionis has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
